description: ISS-064: a battle-shocked unit falling back at edition 11 applies its 06.03 desperate-escape hazards EXACTLY ONCE. Hazards land at BEGIN_FALL_BACK (FallBackMove template); CONFIRM_UNIT_MOVE must NOT re-apply them (legacy 10e desperate-escape gated to edition < 11). A 5-model synthetic unit (owner 2, the active player) is injected so it stays coherent after a loss. Assertion is relative: alive after CONFIRM equals alive after BEGIN.

steps.script: GameState.state["units"].merge({"U_T064": {"id": "U_T064", "owner": 2, "status": 2, "flags": {"battle_shocked": true}, "status_effects": {"battle_shocked": true}, "meta": {"name": "Retreaters", "keywords": ["INFANTRY"], "stats": {"move": 6, "toughness": 4, "save": 4, "wounds": 1, "objective_control": 1}}, "models": [{"id": "m0", "alive": true, "wounds": 1, "current_wounds": 1, "base_mm": 32, "base_type": "circular", "position": {"x": 220.0, "y": 2400.0}}, {"id": "m1", "alive": true, "wounds": 1, "current_wounds": 1, "base_mm": 32, "base_type": "circular", "position": {"x": 260.0, "y": 2400.0}}, {"id": "m2", "alive": true, "wounds": 1, "current_wounds": 1, "base_mm": 32, "base_type": "circular", "position": {"x": 300.0, "y": 2400.0}}, {"id": "m3", "alive": true, "wounds": 1, "current_wounds": 1, "base_mm": 32, "base_type": "circular", "position": {"x": 340.0, "y": 2400.0}}, {"id": "m4", "alive": true, "wounds": 1, "current_wounds": 1, "base_mm": 32, "base_type": "circular", "position": {"x": 380.0, "y": 2400.0}}]}}, true)
